Name: Quarry Tormentor
Summary: Opening curse caster that punishes tanks for staying too healthy.
Description:
[Curse] Remove Curse of Torment quickly or heal through the absorb to clear it.
[Tank] Respect the extra shadow damage while you are above 65% health.
[Priority] This mob is a clean first kick or first kill in quarry pulls.

Name: Rotting Ghoul
Summary: Tank-bleeding undead that snowballs without disease removal.
Description:
[Tank] Rotting Strikes stacks quickly, so kite or use a defensive once stacks rise.
[Disease] Remove the disease when possible to keep the pull stable.
[Routing] Avoid pairing multiple ghouls with other tank busters unless cooldowns are ready.

Name: Arcanist Cadaver
Summary: Mandatory interrupt caster that threatens the whole group.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt every Netherburst cast.
[Priority] Assign this cast before the pull starts if there are multiple dangerous mobs.
[Cleanup] Once kicks are stable, finish this mob before moving on.

Name: Ymirjar Graveblade
Summary: Immune melee elite with a tank buster and repeated ground eruptions.
Description:
[Tank] Frostbane Slash needs a defensive.
[Dodge] Keep moving around Dark Rupture circles so the lane does not close off.
[Pull Control] Avoid dragging extra casters into this mob if the tank is already taxed.

Name: Rimebone Coldwraith
Summary: Frost caster that mixes random bolts with dispel pressure.
Description:
[Kick] Spend spare interrupts on Icebolt.
[Dispel] Remove Permeating Cold with magic dispels or freedom effects.
[Defensive] Use personals if two players keep the debuff during overlap damage.

Name: Glacieth
Summary: Final-wing mini-boss that fills the bridge with puddles and directional pressure.
Description:
[Spread] Cryoburst hits every player and leaves puddles, so stay loose and move together to fresh space.
[Dodge] Avoid Focused Guard and save damage for the crit window behind the mob.
[Priority] Kill this mini-boss promptly so the bridge section stays manageable.
